nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for complex literature
nodes.grounding_span: For some papers that were highly complicated or too long for me to read through, I relied on using AI to save time.

nodes.label: AI as analytical aid for literature and statistics
nodes.label_negative: Unaided analysis of literature and statistics
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI tools to help me analyze the literature during review. I also used AI tools when I was trying to determine the best statistical analysis to apply to my specific datasets.

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I would conduct follow up research, cross check its analysis with other researchers and online information, in addition to relying on my proficiency with the science to determine if its analysis was sound.

nodes.label: AI use in paper writing vs. personal voice
nodes.label_negative: AI use in paper writing without personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: With paper writing specifically, Ive avoided using AI because I wanted my own insights and findings to be communicated.

nodes.label: AI for tedious data collection and statistical analysis
nodes.label_negative: Manual data collection and statistical analysis
nodes.grounding_span: Statistical analysis and data collection. This is an extremely time-consuming and tedious process that wastes lots of human time.

nodes.label: Scientific accuracy and rigor
nodes.grounding_span: cross check its analysis with other researchers and online information

nodes.label: Personal intellectual ownership and voice
nodes.grounding_span: I wanted my own insights and findings to be communicated
